capabilities.name: Custom cross-section geometry design & die engineering
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables 'custom cross-sectional shapes' — translates functional geometry requirements into producible die/roll set designs

capabilities.name: Precision cold finishing to IT8 tolerances
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables 'tight dimensional tolerances' — cold drawing/rolling through carbide dies achieves ±0.02 mm repeatability bar-to-bar

capabilities.name: Selective induction surface hardening
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables 'selectable surface hardness' — produces 58–64 HRC surface with ductile core, controllable depth 0.5–5 mm

capabilities.name: Near-net-shape forming
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables '40–80% machining waste elimination' — profile cross-section closely matches final part geometry
constraints: Minimum batch ~100 kg to amortize die setup
Geometry locked once die is cut

capabilities.name: Multi-alloy grade processing
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables supply across diverse application requirements — carbon, alloy, bearing, spring, tool steels processable through common equipment
constraints: Steel and stainless only — no Al, Ti, non-ferrous

capabilities.name: Hot rolling of large cross-sections
capabilities.fpLinkage: Bulk forming from billet for large profiles (100–7,650 mm²); enables bar lengths up to 12 m
constraints: Requires cold finishing for tight tolerances

capabilities.name: Mechanical post-processing
capabilities.fpLinkage: CNC cutting, drilling, milling, grinding transforms profiles into finished parts (Fertigteile)

capabilities.name: Heat treatment
capabilities.fpLinkage: Normalizing, quenching & tempering, case hardening to achieve target mechanical properties
constraints: Standard capability — not differentiating vs. competitors

capabilities.name: Traceability & automotive quality certification
capabilities.fpLinkage: IATF 16949 + EN 10204 3.1 enable supply to regulated markets (automotive, aerospace, medical, defense)

combinations.name: Custom precision profiles
combinations.targetApplications: Linear guides, elevator rails, firearms components, pump components — any unit requiring custom-geometry precision steel bars

combinations.name: Custom precision hardened profiles
combinations.targetApplications: Linear motion guides, machine tool slideways, hydraulic cylinder rods — units requiring hardened running surfaces

combinations.name: Near-net-shape multi-alloy
combinations.targetApplications: Any high-volume application currently machined from bar stock where near-net-shape offers >30% material savings at ≥100 kg/batch

combinations.name: Complete finished parts
combinations.targetApplications: Fertigteile — outsourced end-to-end part production from die design through machining to ready-to-install component

combinations.name: Certified precision hardened supply
combinations.targetApplications: Automotive OEM, defense, medical device, aerospace — traceable, qualified for regulated industries

trackATargets.description: Custom-geometry precision steel bars or profiles
trackATargets.examples: Guide rails, slideways, spline shafts, keybar profiles, structural inserts, rack profiles
Linear motion guides, cam profiles, wear strips, rail profiles, valve stems with hard contact zones
Any unit currently machined from bar stock where near-net-shape offers >30% material savings and volume ≥100 kg/batch

trackBTargets.adjacentUnits: Welded profile assemblies, multi-piece guide systems
Corrosion-resistant precision guides for marine, food, outdoor applications
Complete subassemblies (guide rail + carriage, profile + bracket)
Stainless steel profiles for food/pharma/chemical; aluminum profiles
Hybrid profiles with 3D features added to 2D extruded base

trackCTargets.coverageQuestion: Can ZOLLERN supply a finished, ready-to-install component (not just material input)? Requires C7 expansion + customer-specific testing/qualification.
Can ZOLLERN supply assembled subunits? Requires joining, assembly, and testing capabilities.
